semanticCore: Uprooting, desisting, withholding, ceasing rain, sails, or pulling out

keyDerivations.meaning: To cease, desist, withhold, pull back, or stop raining

figurativeOrRareUsages: وَقِيلَ يَا أَرْضُ ابْلَعِي مَاءَكِ وَيَا سَمَاءُ أَقْلِعِي وَغِيضَ الْمَاءُ (11:44): And it was said: 'O earth, swallow your water, and O sky, cease/withhold your rain.' And the water subsided.
summaryEn: The root denotes pulling back or desisting (Qal'), representing the command given to the heavens to stop raining and bring Noah's flood to an end.
summaryAr: يشير هذا الجذر إلى النزع والاستئصال، والإمساك والكف عن العمل ككف المطر (قلع)، مصوراً انتهاء الطوفان بأمر السماء بالإمساك والامتناع عن صب الماء.
rawText: أَقْلَعَ 4 It (rain) left off. (The lexicons passim.) It cleared away; syn. إِنْجَلَى. (TA.) === أَقْلَعَ عَنْهُ He, or it, left him, or quitted him, or it. (Mgh, Msb, K.) He abstained, or desisted, from it. (S.) === أَقْلَعَ It (hard fortune) departed: see an ex. voce إِبِدٌ. === أَقْلعَتِ الحُمَّى The fever passed away. إِقْتَلَعَ 8 see 1. اِنْقَلَعَ 7 It became pulled out, or up, or off; became removed from its place, displaced, eradicated, uprooted, or unrooted; it fell, or came, out. You say, إِنْقَلَعَتْ أَسْنَانُهُ [His teeth fell, or came, out.] (TA, art. حس.) تَقَلَّعَ فِى مَشْيِهِ 5 He walked as though he were descending a declivity. (TA.) قَلَعَ 1 and 🡻اِفْتَلَعَ He pulled, plucked, tore, wrenched, or rooted, out, or up, or off; detached; removed from his or its place; displaced; (Msb, K *;) eradicated; uprooted; unrooted. (K.) === تَقْلَعُ (K in art. جذو) and تقلعُ السَّيْرَ (TA in that art.) [app. for تَقْلَعُ فِى السَّيْرِ], said of she-camels, (K ib.) [app. They raise their feet clear from the ground: see قَلِعٌ and قُلْعٌ: the pret. seems to be قَلِعَ: so if تَقْلَعُ be the right reading: but in a copy of the K it seems to be تُقْلِعُ: see جَاذٍ, art. جذو. قَلَعَةٌ as meaning Large stones: see مِرْدًى. قَلْعِىٌّ : see رَصاَصٌ and آنُكٌ; in Turkish قَلَاىْ. قُلُوعٌ is a quasi-inf. n. of the verb in the phrase أَقْلَعَتِ الحُمَّى: see صَلَّ. مَقْلَعٌ : see an ex. voce صَمْغٌ. مِقْلاَعٌ A thing with which one throws a stone; (S;) a sling: (PS:) so in the present day. === See also مِزْعَقٌ.
